title: Full Residential Home Inspection
description: A top‑to‑bottom evaluation of all major systems and components to help buyers understand a home's true condition.

title: Pre-Purchase Buyer's Inspection
description: Detailed inspection for buyers before closing, highlighting current defects, safety concerns, and upcoming maintenance.

title: Pre-Listing / Seller's Inspection
description: Inspection for homeowners preparing to sell, uncovering issues early so you can make repairs and avoid surprises.

title: Condominium / Townhouse Inspection
description: Inspection tailored to condos and townhomes, focusing on interior systems plus visible common elements.

title: General Home Maintenance Inspection
description: Periodic checkups for existing homeowners to catch small issues before they turn into expensive problems.

title: Multi-Unit & Rental Property Inspection
description: Services for duplexes, triplexes, and small apartment buildings to help investors assess condition and repair needs.

title: New Home Pre-Delivery Inspection
description: Inspection of a new build before possession to document defects or incomplete work for the builder to correct.

title: New Home Year-End / Warranty Inspection
description: Comprehensive review near the end of the builder's warranty period to document deficiencies for warranty claims.

title: Commercial Property Inspection
description: Inspections for light commercial buildings (offices, retail, mixed-use), evaluating major systems and overall condition.
